---
name: Bug Report 🐛
about: Create a report to help us improve EvalForge.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug, triage
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots or Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or console/server logs to help explain your problem.

## Environment Details
- **OS**: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS Sonoma, Windows 11]
- **Python Version**: [e.g. 3.11.2]
- **Node/NPM Version**: [e.g. Node 20.x, NPM 10.x]
- **Docker Compose Version**: [e.g. v2.20.0]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
